text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The real Anthropic system card covering Claude Sonnet 4 is titled "System Card: Claude Opus 4 & Claude Sonnet 4" — a joint card for both models, not a standalone "Claude 4 sonnet system card." Additionally, the cited arXiv ID (2401.12168) points to an entirely unrelated paper on spatial reasoning in vision-language models, confirming the URL is fabricated.
LINK: NONE
